name: TARA
title: TIMELESS

abilities.name: Butterfly Jump
abilities.text: After resolving an enemy attack action targeting this model, this model may move up to 3".

abilities.name: Lost in the Moment
abilities.text: When this model is targeted by an attack action, if this model has a Backtrack token, the attacking model cannot cheat fate for the duration of the action.

actions.name: Obliteration's Claw
actions.costs_and_restrictions: This model may choose whether this action is resisted by Df or Wp.

triggers.name: Critical Strike
triggers.text: When resolving, this action deals +1 damage to the target.

triggers.name: Drag Through Time
triggers.text: Give the target a Slow token, then move it up to 2".

actions.name: Rewind
actions.costs_and_restrictions: This action may target friendly models.
actions.effects: Make an Echo marker in base contact with the target. Then, this model may place the target within 4" of its current location. For every raise this action receives, increase the distance this model may place the target by +2.

triggers.name: Alternate Timeline
triggers.text: Choose an ally within 6" of the target. Place the target in base contact with the chosen model, then place the chosen model in base contact with the made marker.

actions.name: Expedite
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Ally only. This action cannot target the same model more than once per activation.
actions.effects: Target gains a Backtrack token, then it may declare a general action.

triggers.name: Chronal Glitch
triggers.text: Place the target in base contact with an Echo marker within 6" of itself.

extraction_notes: Obliteration's Claw has 'X' as resist value, which is unusual but appears intentional based on the costs_and_restrictions text allowing choice between Df or Wp
Rewind resist field shows 'Wp' in the image
